384 H0400_BWL_CNTNC_IND H0400_BWL_CNTNC_IND H0400 Bowel Continence Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's bowel continence level. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the patient's bowel continence level. 0 = Always continent
